creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text: /etc/os-release symbolic link isn't created if you upgrade from 12.1-RELEASE to 12.2-BETA2 with regular steps described in /usr/src/Makefile. This problem doesn't happen if you use freebsd-update. The source is that there no logic to handle symbolic links in mergemaster. And patch to fix it is submitted as bug 242212.
